name: netsec-skills
description: Pentesting skills pack -- 17 tool skills, 6 workflows, 3 agent personas for network security testing with Claude Code

skills.name: nmap
skills.description: Scan networks, discover hosts, detect open ports and services with nmap. Port scanning, host discovery, OS detection, service enumeration, NSE scripts.

skills.name: tshark
skills.description: Capture and analyze network traffic with tshark. Packet capture, protocol analysis, display filters, credential extraction, file carving from pcaps.

skills.name: metasploit
skills.description: Generate payloads, scan services, and set up listeners with Metasploit. Reverse shells, msfvenom, auxiliary scanners, multi/handler.

skills.name: aircrack-ng
skills.description: Audit WiFi security and crack WPA handshakes with aircrack-ng. Wireless scanning, monitor mode, handshake capture, dictionary attacks.

skills.name: hashcat
skills.description: Crack password hashes with GPU acceleration using hashcat. NTLM, MD5, SHA-256, bcrypt, rule-based attacks, benchmarking.

skills.name: skipfish
skills.description: Scan web applications for vulnerabilities with skipfish. Web crawler, authenticated scanning, security assessment.

skills.name: sqlmap
skills.description: Detect SQL injection and extract databases with sqlmap. Parameter testing, WAF bypass, database enumeration, tamper scripts.

skills.name: hping3
skills.description: Craft packets and test firewalls with hping3. TCP flag probes, firewall detection, custom ICMP/UDP/TCP packets.

skills.name: john
skills.description: Crack passwords and identify hash types with John the Ripper. Linux shadows, archive passwords, wordlists, incremental mode.

skills.name: nikto
skills.description: Scan web servers for vulnerabilities with nikto. CGI checks, outdated software, misconfigurations, authenticated scanning.

skills.name: foremost
skills.description: Recover deleted files and carve data from disk images with foremost. File carving, forensic analysis, header/footer recovery.

skills.name: dig
skills.description: Query DNS records and test zone transfers with dig. A, MX, NS, TXT records, AXFR, propagation checks, nameserver queries.

skills.name: curl
skills.description: Debug HTTP requests and inspect SSL certificates with curl. TLS versions, certificate chains, headers, response timing.

skills.name: netcat
skills.description: Scan ports, set up listeners, and transfer files with netcat. TCP/UDP connections, port scanning, reverse shells, file transfer.

skills.name: traceroute
skills.description: Trace network paths and diagnose latency with traceroute and mtr. Hop analysis, route comparison, real-time latency monitoring.

skills.name: gobuster
skills.description: Discover hidden directories and enumerate subdomains with gobuster. Directory brute-force, DNS enumeration, wordlist scanning.

skills.name: ffuf
skills.description: Fuzz web parameters, directories, and endpoints with ffuf. Parameter discovery, content filtering, custom wordlists.

skills.name: recon
skills.description: Run reconnaissance workflow -- host discovery, DNS enumeration, and OSINT gathering

skills.name: scan
skills.description: Run vulnerability scanning workflow -- port scans, web vulnerability scans, and SQL injection testing

skills.name: fuzz
skills.description: Run fuzzing workflow -- directory brute-force, parameter fuzzing, and web scanning

skills.name: crack
skills.description: Run password cracking workflow -- hash identification, dictionary attacks, and brute force

skills.name: sniff
skills.description: Run traffic capture and analysis workflow -- HTTP credentials, DNS queries, and file extraction

skills.name: diagnose
skills.description: Run network diagnostic workflow -- DNS, connectivity, and latency checks

skills.name: scope
skills.description: Define and manage target scope for pentesting engagements

skills.name: netsec-health
skills.description: Check that all pentesting safety hooks are installed and working

skills.name: check-tools
skills.description: Check which pentesting tools are installed on this system

skills.name: report
skills.description: Generate a structured pentesting findings report from the current session

hooks.name: netsec-pretool
hooks.description: Target allowlist validation and raw tool interception -- blocks out-of-scope targets and direct tool calls

hooks.name: netsec-posttool
hooks.description: Audit logging and JSON bridge -- logs tool executions and injects structured context from JSON output

agents.name: pentester
agents.description: Offensive pentesting specialist for multi-tool attack workflow orchestration

agents.name: defender
agents.description: Defensive security analyst for remediation guidance and risk assessment

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Security analysis specialist for structured report synthesis across multiple scans
